Plot an SBS288 catalog as a 3-panel stacked SBS96 plot

Source: R/plot_SBS288.R
plot_SBS288.Rd

Takes a 288-row catalog (3 strand categories x 96 SBS channels) and produces a vertically stacked 3-panel SBS96 plot with a shared y-axis maximum. Row name format: T:A[C>A]T, U:A[C>A]T, N:A[C>A]T where T: is template (transcribed), U: is non-template (untranscribed), and N: is not-transcribed (intergenic).

Usage

plot_SBS288(catalog, plot_title = NULL, ...)

Arguments

catalog

Numeric vector, single-column data.frame, matrix, tibble, or data.table with 288 rows. Row names must have 2-character strand prefixes (T:, U:, N:).

plot_title

Character. Optional overall title for the combined plot.

...

Additional arguments passed to plot_SBS96().

Value

A patchwork object (printable and compatible with ggsave()).
